case_title: ST. CLAIR B.ADAMS DBA/EMERALD CITY EMPORIUM VS LEONARD IFLA DBA DUBLIN CLUB

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-05-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
